name: Karbon Capital Partners Corp.
business: We are a blank check company incorporated as a Cayman Islands exempted company on September 12, 2025. The Company was incorporated for the purpose of effecting a Business Combination. While we may pursue an initial Business Combination target in any industry or geographic location, we intend to focus our search for a target business in the power generation, energy infrastructure and energy technology and security sectors.

exposures.sentence: While we may pursue an initial Business Combination target in any industry or geographic location, we intend to focus our search for a target business in the power generation, energy infrastructure and energy technology and security sectors.

catalysts.sentence: The Company must complete one or more initial Business Combinations having an aggregate fair market value of at least 80% of the net assets held in the Trust Account (excluding the amount of deferred underwriting commissions and taxes payable on the interest earned on the Trust Account) at the time of the signing of the agreement to enter into the initial Business Combination.
